page.title: Girls Trip Yacht Charter in Marbella

data.meta_description: Plan the ultimate girls trip yacht charter in Marbella. Depart Puerto Banús from €749/2h with drinks included. Book your boat today.
data.summary: Discover the best girls trip yacht charter in Marbella with our fleet departing Puerto Banús. Prices start at €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Prices from €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39), including skipper, drinks, and snacks.
Larger yachts like Mangusta 80 from €4,719 for 4 hours, with a free jet ski included.
All charters depart from Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina in Marbella.
Maximum 12 guests on most yachts; smaller boats for 5-6 guests available.
Inclusions: licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, cava, snacks, insurance, and IVA.
Popular destinations: Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Cabopino, and Estepona.
Book via WhatsApp for personalised pricing on non-Tier boats.

faq.q: What is included in a girls trip yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

faq.q: How much does a girls trip yacht charter cost in Marbella?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. For a larger yacht like the Mangusta 80, expect €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours, which includes a free jet ski.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks on the yacht?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. Our packages already include soft drinks, beer, cava, and snacks, but you can supplement with your favourites.

faq.q: What is the maximum number of guests for a girls trip?
faq.a: Most yachts in our fleet accommodate up to 12 guests, perfect for a group of friends. Smaller boats like the Dubhe (5 pax) or Speedboat (6 pax) are ideal for intimate gatherings.

faq.q: Where do the yachts depart from?
faq.a: All charters depart from Puerto Banús in Marbella. You can easily reach the marina by car or taxi, and there is ample parking nearby.

faq.q: What destinations can we visit on a girls trip yacht charter?
faq.a: Popular routes include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Cabopino, and Estepona. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary to your group's preferences, whether you want to anchor for swimming or cruise along the coast.

faq.q: Do I need a boating license to charter a yacht?
faq.a: No, you do not need a licence. Every charter comes with a licensed skipper who handles navigation, so you can relax and enjoy the experience.

faq.q: How do I book a girls trip yacht charter?
faq.a: You can book directly through our website or via WhatsApp for personalised pricing on non-Tier boats. Simply select your preferred yacht and time slot, and we'll confirm your reservation.

data.body_html:
Planning a girls trip to Marbella? A yacht charter from Puerto Banús is the perfect way to celebrate with friends, enjoy the Mediterranean sunshine, and create unforgettable memories. Whether it's a bachelorette party, a birthday, or just a weekend escape, our fleet offers options for every group size and budget. Prices start at just €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40, including skipper, drinks, and snacks. Read on to find the ideal boat for your girls trip yacht Marbella experience.

Why Choose a Girls Trip Yacht Charter in Marbella?

Marbella is synonymous with luxury, sunshine, and vibrant nightlife. A private yacht charter lets you escape the crowds and enjoy the coast on your own terms. From the glamorous Puerto Banús marina to secluded coves like Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés, you'll have the freedom to explore. With a licensed skipper handling everything, you can focus on relaxing, swimming, and sipping cava with your best friends.

Our Fleet for Girls Trips

We have a range of yachts departing from Puerto Banús, all including drinks, snacks, and safety equipment. Here are the most popular options for groups of girls:

Yacht Length Max Guests Price (from)
Astondoa 40 12.5 m 9 €749 / 2h
Azimut 39 12.5 m 11 €749 / 2h
Mangusta 80 24 m 12 €4,719 / 4h (incl. jet ski)
Azimut 58 Flybridge 17.6 m 12 On request
Ferretti 94 29 m 12 On request

For smaller groups, the Dubhe (5 pax) or Speedboat (6 pax) are affordable and fun. Check our full fleet list for more options.

What's Included in Your Charter?

Every girls trip yacht charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras — just bring yourselves and swimwear. You can also bring your own food and additional drinks if you like.

Best Itineraries for a Girls Trip

Your skipper can tailor the route to your group's wishes. Popular itineraries include:

  • Cala del Faro — A rocky cove with crystal-clear water, perfect for swimming and photos.
  • Cala Cortés — A sandy beach near Marbella, ideal for anchoring and lunch.
  • Cabopino — A quieter marina with a lovely beach and chiringuitos.
  • Estepona — A charming town with a picturesque old town and more beaches.
  • Sotogrande — An exclusive area with luxury villas and a beautiful coastline.

Most charters last 4-8 hours, giving you plenty of time to soak up the sun and enjoy the Mediterranean.

How to Book

Booking your girls trip yacht Marbella charter is easy. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), you can book directly on our site. For larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 or Azimut 58, contact us via WhatsApp for personalised pricing. We recommend booking at least a week in advance, especially during peak summer months (June-September).

Tips for the Perfect Girls Trip on a Yacht

  • Bring sunscreen, hats, and sunglasses — the sun is strong even in spring.
  • Pack a playlist for the onboard sound system (most yachts have Bluetooth).
  • Bring a camera for stunning coastal views and group shots.
  • Consider a sunset charter for magical golden hour light.
  • If you want to swim, bring towels and a change of clothes.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a girls trip yacht charter in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

How much does a girls trip yacht charter cost in Marbella?

Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. For a larger yacht like the Mangusta 80, expect €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours, which includes a free jet ski.

Can I bring my own food and drinks on the yacht?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. Our packages already include soft drinks, beer, cava, and snacks, but you can supplement with your favourites.

What is the maximum number of guests for a girls trip?

Most yachts in our fleet accommodate up to 12 guests, perfect for a group of friends. Smaller boats like the Dubhe (5 pax) or Speedboat (6 pax) are ideal for intimate gatherings.

Where do the yachts depart from?

All charters depart from Puerto Banús in Marbella. You can easily reach the marina by car or taxi, and there is ample parking nearby.

What destinations can we visit on a girls trip yacht charter?

Popular routes include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Cabopino, and Estepona. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary to your group's preferences, whether you want to anchor for swimming or cruise along the coast.

Do I need a boating license to charter a yacht?

No, you do not need a licence. Every charter comes with a licensed skipper who handles navigation, so you can relax and enjoy the experience.

How do I book a girls trip yacht charter?

You can book directly through our website or via WhatsApp for personalised pricing on non-Tier boats. Simply select your preferred yacht and time slot, and we'll confirm your reservation.

Ready to plan your girls trip yacht Marbella charter? Browse our full fleet and book today.
